article.summary: US regulators failed to finalize implementing regulations by the GENIUS Act’s one-year deadline, issuing 10 proposed rules instead.

headline: Funds Pile Into $10B Reverse Dispersion Trade Amid Volatility

article.title: Extreme Stock Swings Tempt Funds Into Reverse Dispersion Trade
article.summary: Betting that individual stocks will be volatile while the S&P 500 stays relatively calm has been a popular and successful hedge fund strategy. But with the swings in share prices reaching extreme levels, the reverse trade is gaining traction with investors.

headline: World Cup Boosts Prediction Markets to 27% Share

article.title: Prediction Markets Swell to 27% of Sports Bets During World Cup
article.summary: Prediction-market trading has surged during a blowout World Cup, far outpacing the growth at traditional sportsbooks and driving home the competitive threat that companies like Kalshi now pose to the sports-gambling industry.

headline: US Regulators Miss 1-Year Stablecoin Rule Deadline

article.title: US regulators miss GENIUS Act’s one-year deadline for final stablecoin rules
article.summary: The delay does not postpone the law’s Jan. 18, 2027 effective date, leaving regulators and stablecoin issuers with a compressed implementation window.
